Home / Services / Custom Deck Design & Build

Custom Deck Design & Build

Transform your outdoor living space with a custom-designed deck tailored to your needs.

Dreaming of a deck that perfectly complements your Atlanta home? We specialize in custom deck design and construction, creating outdoor spaces that are both beautiful and functional. From initial concept to final installation, we work closely with you to bring your vision to life.

We consider every detail, from the size and shape of your deck to the materials and finishes. Whether you envision a sprawling multi-level deck for entertaining or a cozy, intimate space for relaxation, we have the expertise to make it a reality. We navigate Atlanta's permitting process, ensuring your deck meets all local codes and regulations.

Our team uses only the highest-quality materials, chosen for their durability and resistance to Atlanta's humid climate. We offer a wide range of decking options, including pressure-treated lumber, composite decking, and exotic hardwoods. We handle all aspects of the project, including framing, decking, railings, stairs, and lighting, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Initial Consultation & Design – Discuss your vision, budget, and site conditions.
  2. 02 Step 2: Material Selection & Permitting – Choose your materials and obtain necessary permits.
  3. 03 Step 3: Construction & Installation – Expert construction following approved plans.
  4. 04 Step 4: Final Inspection & Walkthrough – Ensure your complete satisfaction.

Benefits

  • Increased Home Value
  • Enhanced Outdoor Living Space
  • Customized Design to Fit Your Needs
  • Durable Construction for Long-Lasting Enjoyment

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of decking material is best for Atlanta's climate?

Composite decking is a popular choice due to its resistance to moisture, fading, and insect damage. Pressure-treated lumber is another cost-effective option, but it requires regular maintenance.

How long does it take to build a custom deck?

The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project, but typically ranges from 2 to 6 weeks. We'll provide a detailed schedule during the initial consultation.

Do I need a permit to build a deck in Atlanta?

Yes, in most cases, a permit is required for deck construction in Atlanta. We handle the permitting process for you, ensuring compliance with all local regulations.

Get a Free Estimate
